name: pi-ez-delegate
description: A pi package that delegates work into forked pi sessions running in pluggable terminal multiplexer targets.

scripts.check: node --check extensions/delegate.js && node --check lib/config.js && node --check lib/delegate.js && node --check lib/layout.js && node --check lib/manager.js && node --check lib/registry.js && node --check lib/tmux.js && node --check test/config.test.js && node --check test/delegate.test.js && node --check test/layout.test.js && node --check test/manager.test.js && node --check test/registry.test.js && node --check test/smoke-tmux.js
scripts.test: node --test test/config.test.js test/delegate.test.js test/layout.test.js test/manager.test.js test/registry.test.js
